description_long: This is a semi-automatic handgun with a sleek, black metallic finish and a compact, ergonomic design. The frame and slide are constructed from dark metal, with subtle curves and angular lines that give it a modern, tactical appearance. The grip features a textured, checkered pattern for enhanced handling, and is adorned with a circular logo emblem. The trigger guard is rounded and robust, providing ample space for finger placement and control. The barrel is short and integrated smoothly into the slide, with no visible threading or compensators. Minimalistic controls and a streamlined profile make this handgun suitable for urban environments where concealment and quick access are important.
description: A compact, black semi-automatic handgun with a textured grip and sleek, modern lines. The design features a checkered grip, rounded trigger guard, and a smooth, unadorned barrel.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the checkered grip, trigger, and slide with a visible logo on the grip.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the barrel opening, front sight, and the width of the slide.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the grip texture, slide, and trigger, with less visible logo detail.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the slide, hammer area, and the alignment of the sights.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is angular and contoured for ergonomic handling, featuring a prominent checkered texture for improved traction. It is constructed from a dark polymer or composite material, with a circular logo emblem embedded near the center. The grip panels are slightly raised and bordered, providing a secure hold, and the overall shape is designed to fit comfortably in the hand without finger grooves or additional embellishments.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, offering a robust and protective enclosure for the trigger. It is smoothly integrated into the frame, with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and lacks any visible texturing or accessory rails. The design is simple and functional, prioritizing comfort and accessibility.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is short and seamlessly integrated into the slide, with a standard round profile and no visible threading, porting, or compensators. The exterior finish matches the rest of the handgun, with a smooth, glossy black surface and no external markings or fluting.
attribute_slide_markings: The slide appears to have minimal visible markings, with no prominent engravings, serial numbers, or caliber designations. The only notable marking is the circular logo on the grip, while the slide itself remains clean and unadorned.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: The magazine base is flat and flush with the bottom of the grip, featuring a beveled edge for easy insertion and removal. There are no finger rests, extensions, or visible logos on the floorplate, maintaining a streamlined and unobtrusive appearance.
